social.mission: We are committed to creating jobs, supporting local communities, and proving that Georgian technology can compete on the world stage. Every ride you take helps build a stronger local tech ecosystem.

testimonials.subtitle: Read reviews from travelers who experienced our services

review1.text: Excellent service! The driver was punctual and very professional. The car was clean and comfortable. Highly recommend!
review1.name: John Smith

review2.text: Fast and reliable taxi service. The driver arrived on time and knew all the best routes. Will definitely use again!

review3.text: Best taxi service in Georgia. Professional drivers, clean cars, and very fair prices. Highly recommended!
review3.name: Thomas Mueller

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about using Lulini

download.question: How do I download the Lulini app?
download.answer: You can download the Lulini app for free from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store. Simply search for 'Lulini' and install it on your device.

callTaxi.question: How do I call a taxi?
callTaxi.answer: Open the Lulini app, set your pickup location and destination, choose your vehicle type, and confirm the ride. A driver will be assigned to you within moments.

payment.question: What payment methods are available?
payment.answer: Lulini supports cash payments as well as credit/debit cards. You can save your card details in the app for faster payments on future rides.

fare.question: How is the fare calculated?
fare.answer: Fares are calculated based on distance traveled and ride duration. You'll see an estimated fare before confirming your ride, so there are no surprises.

safety.question: What safety measures are in place for passengers?
safety.answer: All our drivers undergo thorough background checks. Every ride is tracked via GPS, and you can share your trip details with friends or family in real-time.

privacy.question: How is my personal information protected?
privacy.answer: We use industry-standard encryption to protect your data. Your personal information is never shared with third parties without your consent.

share.question: Can I share my ride with someone?
share.answer: Yes! You can share your real-time trip status with any contact directly from the app. They'll be able to see your route and estimated arrival time.

rating.question: How does the rating system work?
rating.answer: After each ride, both drivers and passengers can rate each other on a 5-star scale. This helps us maintain high service quality across the platform.
